text.title: Solo Deploy Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Solo Deploy Checklist end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: pre-deploy
step.action: Tick 9 pre items: backup, branch, tests green, migration plan, rollback plan, feature flag default, observability, customer comms, time-of-day.
step.decision-gate: If any pre item fails, abort.

step.name: execute-deploy
step.action: Run deploy; watch logs; smoke-test critical paths.

step.name: stability-window
step.action: Watch metrics for N minutes (default 15). Declare 'stable' only if error rate < baseline + 0.5%.

step.name: post-deploy
step.action: Mark release tag, update changelog, verify metrics, send customer comms if applicable.
